commands.repair_reason: - [P1] Human review is needed because the PR changes a destructive CLI surface, lacks required real behavior proof, and still needs maintainer agreement on ClawHub-only versus broad skill deletion semantics.; Needs attention: The diff adds a destructive skill-directory removal path that lacks ClawHub provenance gating.; Review finding: [P1] Make the uninstall path non-null before removing — src/skills/lifecycle/claw... (sha=7479a0dac3634e9c12cfe57990771b252fb8b926)
commands.review_summary:
Adds a root spec note plus a `skills uninstall` CLI command backed by new ClawHub skill uninstall planning and execution helpers.

PR surface: Source +141, Docs +50. Total +191 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the blocking patch defects. Source inspection of PR head shows a nullable path passed to `fs.rm` and directory deletion based only on `skillDirExists`; no mutating repro was run because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human review is needed because the PR changes a destructive CLI surface, lacks required real behavior proof, and still needs maintainer agreement on ClawHub-only versus broad skill deletion semantics.

target.title: feat(cli): add skills uninstall command
target.body:
## Summary

Add `openclaw skills uninstall <slug>` CLI command that cleanly removes a ClawHub-installed skill from the active workspace. Mirrors the existing `skills install` flow and the `plugins uninstall` pattern.

## Changes

- **`src/skills/lifecycle/clawhub.ts`**:
  - Added `SkillUninstallPlan` and `SkillUninstallResult` types
  - Added `planSkillUninstall()` - creates uninstall plan with slug validation
  - Added `executeSkillUninstall()` - removes skill dir and lockfile entry

- **`src/cli/skills-cli.ts`**:
  - Added `uninstall` command with `--dry-run`, `--yes`, `--json`, `--global`, `--agent` flags

## Proof

### `--dry-run` output
```
$ openclaw skills uninstall test-skill --dry-run
The following would be removed:
  - workspace directory:  /Users/.../.openclaw/workspace/skills/test-skill
  - lockfile entry:       .clawhub/lock.json#test-skill
(dry-run: no changes will be made)
```

### Actual uninstall with `--yes`
```
$ openclaw skills uninstall test-skill --yes
Removed skill directory: /Users/.../.openclaw/workspace/skills/test-skill
Removed lockfile entry: .clawhub/lock.json#test-skill
Uninstalled test-skill:
  ✓ removed workspace directory
  ✓ removed lockfile entry
```

### Non-existent skill
```
$ openclaw skills uninstall nonexistent
Skill 'nonexistent' is not installed in /Users/.../.openclaw/workspace
```

## Issue

Fixes #63272

---

**Labels**: clawsweeper:fix-shape-clear, clawsweeper:queueable-fix, P2
target.author: xydigit-zt
